title: Hans Rosling: Global population growth, box by box

claims.claim_text: The world population reached 3 billion people at some point

provisional.explanation: World population reached approximately 3 billion around 1960, a well-established demographic milestone.

confirmed.explanation: The world population reached 3 billion around 1960, according to the United Nations and demographic historical records. This is a well-established historical fact. The population has since grown well past this milestone, reaching 8 billion in November 2022.

claims.claim_text: The world population reached 3 billion people in 1960.

provisional.explanation: The world population is widely documented to have reached approximately 3 billion around 1959-1960, with the UN typically citing 1960 as the milestone year.

confirmed.explanation: According to UN demographic data and other authoritative sources, the world population reached approximately 3 billion in 1960. This is a well-established historical fact.
